anti_claim: This fixture validates public memory temporal-conflict replay boundaries with public agent-execution trace spans; synthetic rows remain fixture inputs and negative cases. It does not claim live memory product quality, expose private transcripts, auto-promote private candidates, treat memory as source authority, adopt active injection, call providers, mutate source, or authorize release.

anti_claim_contract.rule: memory temporal-conflict material must state that synthetic replay is not live memory product quality or source authority

omission_receipt.reason: public slice carries memory metadata refs, public trace spans, negative fixtures, and secret/live-access exclusion evidence only

receipt_expectations: receipt must cite source refs, source pattern ids, decision counts, conflict-edge count, stale-downgrade count, replay-pair counts, answer-delta ref, negative-case coverage, secret-exclusion scan, public agent-execution trace, body-import verification, authority ceiling, and anti-claim

source_coupling_contract.rule: macro source refs stay path-level metadata, public trace target refs stay public-root relative, and private memory bodies remain excluded

standard_payload.anti_purpose: Treating public memory replay trace spans as live memory product performance, source authority, or private transcript export.
standard_payload.ontology: A public-safe memory temporal-conflict replay: memory event trace spans, conflict edges, stale downgrade refs, metadata-only private refs, paired cold replay receipts, answer-delta refs, and falsification fixtures.
standard_payload.teleology: Make Microcosm show how agent-memory honesty claims are gated by public trace spans, temporal conflict edges, stale-memory downgrades, negative cases, and authority ceilings before any public claim is admitted.

validation_rules: require ADD, UPDATE, DELETE, and NOOP memory decisions
require conflict-edge refs before updates or stale fact deletion can affect replay
require stale-downgrade refs before replay credit
require metadata-only private thread refs and body_exported false
require paired memory-enabled and memory-disabled cold replay receipts with answer-delta ref
reject raw transcript exports, private auto-promotion, stale overrides, source-authority overclaims, vector-only recall, final-answer-only credit, and active-injection authority
emit body-free receipts, public agent-execution trace, and secret-exclusion scan
